presentation.tagline: Art is heard in silence, until words compose its soundtrack
presentation.body1: Poemarte was born from the desire to accompany artistic creation with the power of words. Each poem is an echo, a caress that translates what the artwork suggests.
presentation.body2: Poemarte is an invitation to look with the soul and listen with the heart. To discover that every artwork holds a heartbeat, a breath of its own, that words can awaken.
presentation.body3: Every artwork holds a story that deserves to be told.

services.title: Services
services.artesanales_sub: Words as the seal of the handmade
services.colaboraciones_sub: Bespoke poems, created from the essence

collaborations.title: Recent collaborations
collaborations.tagline: Each collaboration is a dialogue between art and word

about.title: About Poemarte
about.subtitle: A Soundtrack of Words
about.what_sub: Poemarte listens to works of art and writes their soundtrack of words.

process.phase1_sub: Everything begins with an encounter with the artwork.
process.phase2_sub: From that experience, an original poem inspired by the artwork is created.
process.phase3_sub: The final step is deciding how the poem will accompany the artwork.

meta.description: Poemarte creates poems inspired by works of art. A soundtrack of words for artists, craftspeople and galleries.
